title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery released a tutorial on building a Duolingo clone in React Native using "Practical Vibe Coding," a workflow that leverages AI agents to reduce development time from months to a weekend. The tutorial covers setup, UI design, authentication with Clerk, analytics with PostHog, Vision Agents for image recognition, and streaming integration.
